title: Handoff Clarity Notice
prompt:
Create a production-ready Handoff Clarity Notice using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build a compact work-handoff status notice that starts with a clear Ready for handoff message and lets a user reveal two exact handoff checks: owner confirmed and next review scheduled. A single sky-blue status chip moves from Draft to Ready when the user marks the handoff complete; visible wording must always describe the state. Use a #F4F5F6 surrounding canvas, white Bento notice, #ECECEE border, 22px radius, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F helper copy. Sky blue is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or turn the notice into a transient toast.

Use a semantic section with a labelled disclosure button using aria-expanded and aria-controls, plus a native completion button with aria-pressed. Both controls need 44px targets and visible 3px dark focus rings. Click, Enter, and Space must produce the same state change. Hover may lift 2px in 180ms and press may compress 1px in 90ms. Expand the check list with a stiffness 310, damping 27 spring and move the chip with a 180ms opacity/transform transition. Use a polite live region to announce disclosure and completion changes. Use local state only; no timers, random values, browser storage, remote data, or network requests.

At 320px, stack the two actions and preserve readable labels; on larger previews, let the notice remain compact. Keep logical tab order, AA contrast, and visible state text that does not rely on color. Respect prefers-reduced-motion with immediate changes or 120ms fades. Return full TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
  • Owner confirmed
*/ .uiwiki-handoff{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111}.uiwiki-handoff button{min-height:44px;margin-top:12px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-handoff button:last-child{background:#111;color:#fff}.uiwiki-handoff button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-handoff *{transition:none!important}}
